rsvp: Fill out the response form to let us know if you can come to our wedding. You can fill out the form in any language you prefer, but we recommend Finnish or English.
home-intro: Two days. Three venues. In the West End of Glasgow Scotland meets Finland. There will be food. There will be pet nat. There may be sharks. Join the party of the century.
Day_1_text: Day 1 (Saturday) will start with a ceremony at the Glasgow University Chapel. The ceremony will start promptly at 4pm so please arrive early, preferably at 3.30pm. The gothic cloisters provide a fabulous photo opportunity whilst you wait. The ceremony will last about an hour after which you will be required to make your own way to the reception venue. The reception will be held at the SWG3 Warehouse, a short 20 minute walk or a short uber ride from the University chapel. Please aim to arrive at the Warehouse by 6pm latest. The evening will continue late into the night. Dress code: summer wedding chic
Day_2_text: On Day 2 (Sunday) we would be delighted to host you for a relaxed cocktail reception at our all time favourite place, the beautiful Kibble Palace in the Botanic Gardens, from 6pm-10pm. YOu can join for as long as you wish. Light snacks and drinks will be on offer. Dress code: smart casual with a touch of botanical. Note the greenhouse can be warm on a sunny day.
journey text: Although there are no direct flights from Helsinki to Glasgow, the city is easily reached by train from Edinburgh (the journey lasts approximately 45 minutes). Finnair and Norwegian fly directly from Helsinki to Edinburgh several times a week. Alternatively, Finnair also flies to Manchester from where you can take a train to Glasgow. London is approximately 4.5 hours on the train from Glasgow. The venues are all located in the lovely West End of Glasgow, and we STRONGLY RECOMMEND you find accomodation in this area.
